history.content:
<thought>
I am currently facing right (`>`), standing on a floor cell near the top-left corner. The goal is located at the bottom-right corner. However, there is lava (`L`) directly ahead to my right. If I move forward, I will step into lava, which is dangerous. I need to find a safe path downward to get around the lava. My current facing right is not helpful for moving downwards along the left side. To proceed safely, I should turn right to face downwards (`v`) so I can move down along the left column of safe floor cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now I am facing downwards (`v`) next to a lava cell on my right. The path directly below me is a floor cell, so moving forward is safe and will bring me closer to the goal. I will move forward to progress down the left side of the map along floor cells.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down (`v`) and currently on the second row from the top, leftmost floor cell. The path directly ahead is also a floor cell and moving down one more cell will bring me closer to the bottom where the goal is. There are lava cells to my right, so I must continue moving forward down the safe path along the left edge.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now on the third row from the top, facing down, and the floor cell beneath me is free of obstacles. Continuing to move downwards on this safe path keeps me on track to reach the goal at the bottom right. I will move forward again.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now on the fourth row from the top, facing down. The path directly ahead is clear floor cells leading downwards. Continuing to move forward will keep me safely on the left path and closer to the bottom row where the goal is located.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am on the fifth row from the top, still facing down. The path directly ahead remains clear of obstacles. Moving forward will get me closer to the bottom row, making further progress towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now on the sixth row from the top, still facing down. Ahead of me is lava (`L`) blocking the path. Moving forward is not safe. I should turn right to face left, avoiding lava and exploring an alternative path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left on the sixth row, but the left cells contain lava (`L`), which is impassable. I need to turn around to face right toward the open path on the right side of the map to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing up, but ahead are lava cells. The safe path is clearly on the right side of the map, so I should turn right twice to face right, then move toward the open hallway to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right, but immediately in front are lava cells. Moving forward would be dangerous. I should turn left to face down, where there is a clear path toward the goal in the bottom row.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up again with lava in front, so turning left previously did not help. Instead, I should try turning right twice from the original position to face left to explore if that clears a path or turning right again to face right and then move forward if path is clear.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am again facing right with lava immediately in front. Turning right was just reversing the previous turn. Instead, I should try turning right one more time to face down, which is the only open path towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now I am facing down, but there is lava directly in front. I cannot move forward safely. The goal is located to the right along the bottom row, so I should turn right twice from here to face left or turn left to face right again. The best option is to turn left once to face right toward the empty path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right again, but I'm blocked by lava in front. Instead of moving forward, I should explore turning left to face upwards to find a safe path around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up but the path forward is blocked by lava. Turning right to face right along the bottom row, where there is a safe floor path and the goal is located, will help me navigate around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right but there is lava immediately in front of me, so moving forward is not safe. Turning left to face up might allow me to find an alternate path since I cannot cross lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up with lava blocking the way forward again. Turning left will have me face left, which is a wall, so it won't help. Turning right will have me face right, which leads to lava. The best option is to turn around by turning left twice to face down, so I can move along the bottom row safely toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing left, but there is a wall immediately on my left. To face down, which is the safe path to the goal, I will turn left once more.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down now, with a clear path ahead on empty floor cells. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal-by moving along the bottom row towards the goal cell `G`.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down against a wall, so I cannot move forward. To proceed along the bottom row towards the goal on the right, I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Now that I am facing right (`>`), I have a clear path along the bottom row towards the goal cell `G`. I will move forward towards it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`), so I will continue moving forward along the bottom row towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right (`>`), and the goal is still ahead in the same row. I will keep moving forward along the bottom row towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`), and the goal is still ahead to the right. I will continue moving forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`), and the goal `G` is just one cell to my right. Moving forward will bring me onto the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
